tagline: Cernify turns robot product evidence into an interactive overseas patent risk map.

core_capabilities.purpose: Turn public or synthetic robot evidence into a component graph.
Map robot components and technical features to patent-risk review areas.
Generate a draft evidence package for human review.

data_boundary: UCWS public demo uses public or synthetic data only.
legal_boundary: Not legal advice, not an infringement determination, not a validity opinion, and not a final freedom-to-operate opinion.
public_repository_excludes: production patent retrieval, ranking, scoring, or FTO reasoning internals
customer workspaces, customer files, or customer reports
internal APIs, task queues, billing, authentication internals, or deployment secrets
API keys, tokens, cookies, logs, .env files, HAR files, or database dumps
full third-party source videos or unlicensed robot media packs
evaluation_hooks: Product evidence is converted into structured robot components.
Evidence status is explicit: observable, inferred, missing, or out of scope.
Patent-risk review is grounded in components and technical features.
Outputs are suitable for human legal and technical review.
UCWS integration is capability-based and avoids exposing raw internal APIs.
Public data boundaries are clear and enforceable.
